title: Nee Korinaal Lyrics 180 Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Nee Korinal (Theeye inrdiye) Song Lyrics From 180 

Artist(s): Karthik, Swetha 

Lyricist: Karky 
Movie: 180
Music : Shareth

Na na na na na na na na 
Na na na na na na na na 
Na na na na na na na na 
na na na na na na na na
Nee korinaal vaanam maaratha 
Dhinam theeramale 
megam thooraatha..

Theeye inrdiye, 
nee ennai vaatinai
un jannalai adaithadaithu 
penne odathe (2)

Odum odum, 
asaiyathodum azhagiye
odum odum, asaiyathodum 
odum odum azhagiye

Na na na na na na na na 
Na na na na na na na na 
Na na na na na na na na 
na na na na na na na na
Nee korinaal vaanam maaratha 
Dhinam theeramale 
megam thooraatha

kandum theendida, 
naan boathi Jaathiya
En meethi paathi 
bimba poove pattu pogathe(2)

Bothai oorum, 
ithazhin oram, parugava
Bothai oorum, ithazhin oram 
oram oram, parugava ..

Na na na na na na na na 
Na na na na na na na na 
Na na na na na na na na 
na na na na na na na na
Nee korinaal vaanam maaratha 
Dhinam theeramale 
megam thooraatha. (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Nee Korinaal'?

The song 'Nee Korinaal' expresses deep emotions of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic relationships.

What is the plot context of the movie '180'?

The movie 180 revolves around the complexities of love and relationships, showcasing different perspectives on romance.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Karthik and Shweta Mohan.

Who is the music director for 'Nee Korinaal'?

The music for 'Nee Korinaal' is composed by Shareth.

When was 'Nee Korinaal' released?

'Nee Korinaal' was released on July 12, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie 180, the song Nee Korinaal serves as a poignant reflection of love's complexities. It beautifully conveys the emotions of yearning and connection between lovers, making it a perfect backdrop for romantic moments. The soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and warmth, resonating with anyone who has experienced love. This duet encapsulates the essence of romance, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nee Korinaal from the movie 180 is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Karthik and Shweta Mohan's enchanting vocals paired with Shareth's soulful composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the highs and lows of romance. Dive into this melodic journey that perfectly blends emotion and artistry.
stanzaMeanings: Every day, the sky changes because of you, the clouds don't disappear at the shore.
Oh, my love, you have captured my heart, don't let it go, my dear. The beauty of your desires is like a melody that flows.
I have seen the light, I am a wanderer. My sweet flower, don't let the song fade away.
In the town of dreams, on the edge of this world, run away.
Every day, the sky changes because of you, the clouds don't disappear at the shore. (repeated)
